shorts.description: The NEPA Bluegrass Festival returns to Lazy Brook Park, Tunkhannock, drawing thousands to enjoy three days of traditional and progressive bluegrass music.

shorts.title: Man to spend decades in prison for child porn charges
shorts.title_distilled: Man to spend decades in prison for child porn charges.
shorts.description: OLD FORGE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — It'll be decades in prison for a former Old Forge man after he was sentenced in a child sexual abuse material case. Prosecutors say Sterling Barnes was hit with 18-and-a-half to 45 years in prison today on 45 felony counts. The Lackawanna County District Attorney's Office says the case [...]

shorts.title: Repurposing religious relics after church closures
shorts.title_distilled: Repurposing religious relics after church closures.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — The closure of catholic churches is becoming a reality for more communities. But after the final mass, there is another question. What happens to the sacred items inside? The final mass at Nativity Church is Scranton is a day Father Johnathan Kuhar remembers with bitter sweetness. "It was a sad but beautiful experience. [...]

shorts.title: Police seize gun, drugs, search for wanted man
shorts.title_distilled: Police seize gun, drugs, search for wanted man.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — An arrest warrant is now out after investigators say they seized drugs and an AR style shotgun from a south Scranton home. Investigators shared this photo of the haul today. The Lackawanna County District Attorney's Office says the search happened Wednesday night on Cedar Avenue. Police were looking for Benjamin [...]
